output.summary: Blend ResFormer value residuals, DenseFormer depth-weighted averaging, and test-time AdamW tuning across scored validation windows atop the current SOTA.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Test-time training fine-tunes via AdamW on already-scored validation windows before reporting.
techniques: Value residual blending of first-layer V vectors
DenseFormer depth-weighted averaging of all prior layers
Test-time AdamW updates on scored validation tokens
